title: stelis neorubens
intro: Stelis neorubens, also known as the "Pitaya de Monte" or "Mountain Dragon Fruit", is a species of epiphytic orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Stelis neorubens include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. The plant's leaves and flowers are used in herbal preparations, often in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
